title: Cognizant (CTSH) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Cognizant's (CTSH) third-quarter earnings are expected to have benefited from significant growth in its digital business operations, which has been outgrowing the BPO market.

title: The 7 Best Tech Stocks to Buy in November
text: Tech stocks have suffered disproportionately in the current bear market, as they tend to do in every bear market. But the bullish long-term bias of the market tells us that stocks will almost certainly resume their uptrend.

title: Will Cognizant (CTSH) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
